name: Adroit
description: Gain [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
description_zh: 获得[blue]0[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 获得[blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。

name: Clone
description: This card can be duplicated at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
description_zh: 这张牌能在[gold]休息处[/gold]被复制。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌能在[gold]休息处[/gold]被复制。

name: Corrupted
description: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP.
description_zh: 造成的伤害增加[blue]50%[/blue]，但会失去[blue]2[/blue]生命。
description_raw_zh: 造成的伤害增加[blue]50%[/blue]，但会失去[blue]2[/blue]生命。

name: Favored
description: This card's attack damage is doubled.
description_zh: 这张牌的攻击伤害翻倍。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌的攻击伤害翻倍。

name: Glam
description: This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] once per combat.
description_zh: 这张牌每场战斗能够[gold]重放[/gold]一次。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌每场战斗能够[gold]重放[/gold]一次。

name: Goopy
description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
description_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]消耗[/gold]。当被打出时，这张牌的[gold]格挡[/gold]值永久增加[blue]1[/blue]点。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]消耗[/gold]。当被打出时，这张牌的[gold]格挡[/gold]值永久增加[blue]1[/blue]点。
extra_card_text_zh: 这张牌的[gold]格挡[/gold]值永久增加[blue]1[/blue]点。

name: Imbued
description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.
description_zh: 这张牌在每场战斗开始时自动打出。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌在每场战斗开始时自动打出。

name: Instinct
description: Decrease the cost of this card by [blue]1[/blue].
description_zh: 这张牌的费用减少[blue]1[/blue]。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌的费用减少[blue]1[/blue]。

name: Momentum
description: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue][Amount][/blue] this combat when played.
description_zh: 在本场战斗中，每次打出就增加这张牌的攻击伤害[blue][Amount][/blue]点。
description_raw: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat when played.
description_raw_zh: 在本场战斗中，每次打出就增加这张牌的攻击伤害[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。
extra_card_text: Increase this card's damage by [Amount] this combat.
extra_card_text_zh: 在本场战斗中这张牌的伤害增加[Amount]点。

name: Nimble
description: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue][Amount][/blue].
description_zh: 这张牌获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]值增加[blue][Amount][/blue]点。
description_raw: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
description_raw_zh: 这张牌获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]值增加[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。

name: Perfect Fit
description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], place it on the top instead.
description_zh: 每当这张牌要被洗入[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，将其放在抽牌堆顶。
description_raw_zh: 每当这张牌要被洗入[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，将其放在抽牌堆顶。

name: Royally Approved
description: This card has [gold]Innate[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold].
description_zh: 这张牌拥有[gold]固有[/gold]和[gold]保留[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌拥有[gold]固有[/gold]和[gold]保留[/gold]。

name: Sharp
description: Increases damage on this card by [blue][Amount][/blue].
description_zh: 这张牌上的伤害值增加[blue][Amount][/blue]点。
description_raw: Increases damage on this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
description_raw_zh: 这张牌上的伤害值增加[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点。

name: Slither
description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]3[/blue].
description_zh: 当你抽到这张牌时，使其费用在[blue]0[/blue]到[blue]3[/blue]之间随机变化。
description_raw_zh: 当你抽到这张牌时，使其费用在[blue]0[/blue]到[blue]3[/blue]之间随机变化。

name: Slumbering Essence
description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.
description_zh: 回合结束时，如果这张牌在你的手牌中，则将其费用降低[blue]1[/blue]点，直到其被打出。
description_raw_zh: 回合结束时，如果这张牌在你的手牌中，则将其费用降低[blue]1[/blue]点，直到其被打出。

name: Soul's Power
description: This card loses [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
description_zh: 这张牌失去[gold]消耗[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌失去[gold]消耗[/gold]。

name: Sown
description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain [energy:1].
description_zh: 你在每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时，获得[energy:1]。
description_raw: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
description_raw_zh: 你在每场战斗中第一次打出这张牌时，获得{Amount:energyIcons()}。

name: Spiral
description: This card gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
description_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]重放[/gold][blue]1[/blue]。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]重放[/gold][blue]1[/blue]。

name: Steady
description: This card gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
description_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]保留[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 这张牌获得[gold]保留[/gold]。

name: Swift
description: The first time you play this card, draw [blue][Amount][/blue] cards.
description_zh: 你第一次打出这张牌时，抽[blue][Amount][/blue]张牌。
description_raw: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
description_raw_zh: 你第一次打出这张牌时，抽[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌。
extra_card_text: Draw [Amount] cards the first time this is played.

name: Tezcatara's Ember
description: Costs [blue]0[/blue] and gains [gold]Eternal[/gold].
description_zh: 费用为[blue]0[/blue]且获得[gold]永恒[/gold]。
description_raw_zh: 费用为[blue]0[/blue]且获得[gold]永恒[/gold]。

name: Vigorous
description: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue][Amount][/blue] additional damage.
description_zh: 第一次打出这张牌时，造成[blue][Amount][/blue]点额外伤害。
description_raw: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
description_raw_zh: 第一次打出这张牌时，造成[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点额外伤害。
